notice: This contract facilitates peer-to-peer lending using ERC20s as collateral.

claim_ownership().notice: Claim the ownership of the contract

partially_liquidate_loan((bytes32,bytes3.notice: Partialy liquidates a loan if the LTV exceeds the liquidation_ltv, resulting in a write-off of part of the debt and transfer of part of the collateral to the lender. The loan remains active. Can be called by anyone.

liquidate_loan((bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,.notice: Fully liquidates a defaulted loan. Can be called by anyone.

current_ltv((bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,uin.notice: Get the current LTV of a loan.

is_loan_defaulted((bytes32,bytes32,bytes.notice: Check if a loan is defaulted.

replace_loan((bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,ui.notice: Replace an existing loan by accepting a new offer over the same collateral. The current loan is settled and the new loan is created. Must be called by the borrower.

replace_loan_lender((bytes32,bytes32,byt.notice: Sell an existing loan by accepting a new offer over the same collateral. The current loan is settled and the new loan is created. Must be called by the lender.

wallet_to_vault(address).notice: Get the vault address for a given wallet

transfer_loan((bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,u.notice: Transfer a loan to a new borrower.

set_partial_liquidation_fee(uint256).details: Sets the partial liquidation fee to the given value and logs the event. Admin function.

set_full_liquidation_fee(uint256).details: Sets the full liquidation fee to the given value and logs the event. Admin function.

set_protocol_fee(uint256,uint256).details: Sets the protocol fee to the given value and logs the event. Admin function.

change_protocol_wallet(address).details: Changes the protocol wallet to the given address and logs the event. Admin function.

set_proxy_authorization(address,bool).details: Sets the authorization for the given proxy and logs the event. Admin function.

propose_owner(address).details: Proposes a new owner and logs the event. Admin function.

params._address: The address of the proposed owner.

claim_ownership().details: Claims the ownership of the contract and logs the event. Requires the caller to be the proposed owner.

set_transfer_agent(address).details: Sets the transfer agent to the given address. Admin function.

params._address: The address of the new transfer agent.

params.principal: The principal amount of the loan.
params.collateral_amount: The amount of collateral tokens to be used for the loan.
params.borrower_kyc: The signed KYC validation for the borrower.
params.lender_kyc: The signed KYC validation for the lender.

returns._0: The ID of the created loan.

params.loan: The loan to be soft liquidated.
The loan to be soft liquidated.
The loan to which collateral is to be added.
params.collateral_amount: The amount of collateral tokens to be added.

params.loan: The loan to which collateral is to be added.
params.collateral_amount: The amount of collateral tokens to be added.

params.offer: The signed offer to be revoked.

params.loan: The loan to get the current LTV for.

returns._0: The current LTV of the loan.
True if the loan is defaulted, false otherwise.

replace_loan((bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,ui.details: The borrower must be the same as the borrower of the current loan.

params.principal: The principal amount of the new loan, 0 means the outstanding debt
params.collateral_amount: The amount of collateral tokens to be used for the new loan.
params.lender_kyc: The signed KYC validation for the lender.

returns._0: The ID of the new loan.

replace_loan_lender((bytes32,bytes32,byt.details: No collateral transfer is required. The borrower must be the same as the borrower of the current loan.

params.principal: The principal amount of the new loan, 0 means the outstanding debt
params.lender_kyc: The signed KYC validation for the lender.

returns._0: The ID of the new loan.
The vault address for the given wallet

transfer_loan((bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,u.details: Only allowed to be called by the transfer agent. Used for supporting cases of death, lost keys, or legal transfers

params.new_borrower: The address of the new borrower.
params.new_borrower_kyc: The signed KYC validation for the new borrower.
